description: Create versioning module that scans output directory for existing versions and returns next version number
Create resolver module that reads a ref-list YAML, follows refs into controller YAMLs, extracts endpoints by id, and writes a flattened YAML snapshot
Create abstract base generator class with shared utilities (group_by_controller, snake_to_camel, copy_auth_wrapper interface)
Create framework registry with auto-discovery of generator classes from generators/ directory
Create JavaScript browser generator — emits ES module files per controller, barrel index, copies JS OAuth SDK, adds Rollup config for UMD build
Create Node.js generator — emits ESM files per controller, barrel index, copies JS OAuth SDK (no Rollup)
Create PHP generator — emits one class per controller, autoload config, copies PHP OAuth SDK
Create CLI entrypoint (generate.py) that wires together versioning, resolver, registry, and generators with argparse flags
Test resolver against top_endpoints.yaml — verify all 76 refs resolve, flattened YAML is valid, endpoint fields are preserved
Test versioning — verify v1 default, auto-increment, correct scanning of output directory
Test JavaScript browser generator — verify output file structure, function naming (camelCase), path interpolation, query param handling, auth routing, Rollup config presence
Test PHP generator — verify output file structure, function naming (camelCase), class structure (PascalCase), path interpolation, query param handling, auth routing
Test framework registry auto-discovery — verify all generators found, unknown framework raises error
End-to-end test — run full generate.py against top_endpoints.yaml, verify output directory structure, version numbering, file contents for one endpoint per framework
Add emit_errors_file to JavaScript browser generator — emits errors.js with ApiError hierarchy and handleResponse function
Wire handleResponse into JS unauth functions — replace return resp.json() with return handleResponse(resp)
Add emit_errors_file to PHP generator — emits Exceptions.php with ApiException hierarchy and handleResponse function
Wire handleResponse into PHP unauth methods — replace json_decode return with handleResponse call
Ensure Node.js generator inherits error handling — verify emit_errors_file is called in generate() override
Normalize controller names in group_by_controller to replace spaces with underscores, preventing spaces in generated filenames
Static output dir (./sdk_files), archive previous versions to ./sdk_files/archive/v{N}, package resolved YAML inside version dir

touch_points.status: removed --output flag, hardcoded sdk_files, added archive step
scans v{N} dirs instead of resolved/ yaml files
writes into version_dir as resolved_{name}.yaml, removed version param
updated to use v{N} dirs instead of resolved/ files
updated signature and assertions for new output structure
updated to reflect sdk_files/ layout and archive behavior

description: Add composite YAML config format — define composites in api_docs/composites/ that chain 2+ endpoint calls with data flow, caching, and error handling
Add resolve_composites() to resolver — reads composites ref-list, resolves step endpoint refs, embeds flattened endpoint data inline
Add --composites CLI flag to generate.py — resolve composites and pass to generators
Update BaseGenerator — add composites param to generate(), add group_composites_by_controller()
Implement composite function emission in JS generator — once steps with caching, for_each with inline fetch, cross-controller imports, on_error modes
Implement composite method emission in PHP generator — static cache, foreach with inline curl, on_error collect mode
Convert uploadPhotos composite from batch (for_each over photos list) to unary (single photo per call) — caller loops externally, template cache persists across calls
